productSummary: Marketing Autopilot — AI-driven marketing SaaS for indie devs and small teams. Intake (multimodal) → feasibility by region → strategy + Cursor Automation scripts → reporting + human-in-the-loop for verifications.
valuePropositions: Turn product docs and media into a regional marketing plan without hiring an agency
Country-aware channel recommendations (CN vs US vs SEA)
Dogfood your own framework: open-source engine + upcoming UI
Multi-project isolation for founders running several products
Conservative automation with approval gates for cold DM and account creation
audienceHints: Solo founders with shipped product, zero marketing hire
Chinese founders targeting both domestic and global markets
competitorsMentioned: Generic AI copy tools (Jasper, etc.) — we execute + plan, not just write
HubSpot / Mailchimp — too heavy for indie stage
Manual Cursor prompts — no catalog, no region matrix, no ops loop
brandTone: Professional, builder-friendly, honest about beta limits; bilingual CN/EN
visualStyle: Developer docs aesthetic; diagrams over hype; GitHub README as primary landing for now
quotesFromMaterials: 客户使用 Web 界面，不需要 clone 本仓库
按 projectId 生成策略与脚本，执行发帖/获客/加好友等，并汇报
gaps: No public marketing landing page yet — GitHub README is CTA
Product UI v0.2 not shipped — message must set expectations

methodFeasibility.rationale: Rich docs in repo; PH/HN/dev Twitter love builder stories

Twitter/X + LinkedIn builder audience; thread format
